title: Contributor Code of Conduct
text: contributors maintainers project, pledge respect people contribute reporting issues, posting feature requests, updating documentation, submitting pull requests patches, activities. committed making participation project harassment-free experience everyone, regardless level experience, gender, gender identity expression, sexual orientation, disability, personal appearance, body size, race, ethnicity, age, religion. Examples unacceptable behaviour participants include use sexual language imagery, derogatory comments personal attacks, trolling, public private harassment, insults, unprofessional conduct. Project maintainers right responsibility remove, edit, reject comments, commits, code, wiki edits, issues, contributions aligned Code Conduct. Project maintainers follow Code Conduct may removed project team. Instances abusive, harassing, otherwise unacceptable behaviour may reported opening issue contacting one project maintainers. Code Conduct adapted Contributor Covenant (http://contributor-covenant.org), version 1.0.0, available http://contributor-covenant.org/version/1/0/0/

title: Introduction to INBOmd
text: INBOmd package provides several styles rmarkdown files. styles based corporate identity Research Institute Nature Forest (Instituut voor Natuur en Bosonderzoek, INBO).  styles intended use parties external INBO. still provide users inspiration example create corporate identity styles rmarkdown files. templates based bookdown, extension rmarkdown. tailored towards writing books technical documentation.

title: Introduction to INBOmd
text: R freeware open source statistical software. markdown lightweight markup language. formatting doesn’t hinder reading plain text. short easy remember, can edit plain text editor. rmarkdown first execute R code document paste output plain markdown file. rendered requested output format. saves lot work avoid copy/paste errors. Storing R code within report makes easy rerun report data updated. plain text source code lightweight. source code report seldom larger hundred kilobyte. Yes, kilobyte. Plain text files work great combination version control systems like Git. bookdown useful tool conducting open research open science. can get multiple output formats source. report template can yield pdf, e-book website. author doesn’t worry lay-. software takes care rendering documents. frees time author can invest important things. guarantees consistent lay-document across documents.

title: Introduction to INBOmd
text: important template inbo_rapport, template creating technical reports. available output formats pdf, epub html. vlaanderen_rapport flanders_report similar templates inbo_rapport. use corporate identity Flanders. flanders_report available English French. “presentation”: time point presentation one page pdf. Incremental slides result several pages, one increment. “handout”: single page slide. case incremental slides, last slide shown. Useful handouts required combination incremental slides. “report”: mostly relevant slides used teaching code. output may fit single single slide, resulting substantial number slides. Using “report” like style makes handouts compact readable. flanders_slides similar template inbo_slides. uses corporate identity Flanders. presentation handout versions available. inbo_poster template A0 posters pdf format.

title: Introduction to INBOmd
text: INBOmd requires working installation XeLaTeX. highly recommend use TinyTeX. Close open R sessions start fresh R session. Execute commands . install TinyTeX machine. admin rights required. Although TinyTeX lightweight installation, still several 100 MB large. Please note TinyTeX compatible MikTex. Remove MikTex installing TinyTeX. TinyTeX installed, need restart RStudio. can proceed installation INBOmd.
code: update.packages(ask = FALSE, checkBuilt = TRUE) if (!"tinytex" %in% rownames(installed.packages())) {   install.packages("tinytex") } if (!tinytex:::is_tinytex()) {   tinytex::install_tinytex() } if (!"remotes" %in% rownames(installed.packages())) {   install.packages("remotes") } remotes::install_github("inbo/INBOmd", dependencies = TRUE) tinytex::tlmgr_install(c(   "inconsolata",   "times",   "tex",   "helvetic",   "dvips" )) tinytex::tlmgr_conf(   c("auxtrees", "add", system.file("local_tex", package = "INBOmd")) ) tinytex::tlmgr_install(c(   "hyphen-dutch",   "hyphen-french",   "babel-english",   "babel-french",   "babel-dutch" ))

what: Recommended way to start a new report
title: Introduction to INBOmd
text: INBOmd version 0.6.0 introduces interactive function create_report(). function uses template legacy way start new report. create_report() advantage interactively guides user set-. asks user important parts meta data fills information yaml header. report near completion, use add_report_numbers() append DOI, report number, depot number information meta data.

what: Legacy way to start a new document from RStudio templates
title: Introduction to INBOmd
text: INBOmd contains several templates available RStudio. Go menu File > New File > R Markdown. new window open select template. show list available templates. Select template INBOmd want, set name new document base location. create new directory specified name base location. report reside directory. new directory contains _bookdown.yml .Rmd file base name directory. highly recommend rename .Rmd file index.Rmd, see usage section bookdown book details. Next need open _bookdown.yml RStudio. can configure render settings report. book_filename defines filename output. output_dir relative path output. Finally, need activate Build pane RStudio. far easiest way , create new project. Go menu File > New Project choose pop-window Existing directory. Note works index.Rmd file root project.

title: Introduction to INBOmd
text: Go Build pane click Build book button. button doubles drop-menu. menu can select output format rendered. default output formats rendered. report templates define three output formats: pdf, html e-pub. Rendering three output formats can take time. Therefore best select one output format working content document.

title: Introduction to INBOmd
text: maintain separate collection examples based INBOmd. rendered versions available https://inbomd-examples.netlify.app/. Visit https://github.com/inbo/inbomd_examples looking source code examples. Please note main intention examples show available INBOmd code . add links real documents based INBOmd well.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Thierry Onkelinx. Author, maintainer.            Research Institute Nature Forest (INBO) Floris Vanderhaeghe. Contributor.            Research Institute Nature Forest (INBO) Els Lommelen. Contributor.            Research Institute Nature Forest (INBO) . Copyright holder, funder, publisher.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Onkelinx, Thierry (2026) INBOmd: Markdown Templates INBO. Version 0.6.5. https://inbo.github.io/INBOmd/
code: @Manual{,   title = {INBOmd: Markdown Templates for INBO. Version 0.6.5},   author = {Thierry Onkelinx},   year = {2026},   url = {https://inbo.github.io/INBOmd/},   abstract = {Several templates to generate reports, presentations and posters.},   keywords = {markdown; bookdown; corporate identity; template; inbo_version},   doi = {10.5281/zenodo.842223}, }

title: Markdown Templates for INBO
text: INBOmd contains templates generate several types documents corporate identity INBO Flemish government. current package following Rmarkdown templates: INBO pdf_report: reports rendered pdf, html (gitbook style) epub INBO slides: presentations rendered pdf INBO poster: poster rendered A0 pdf Flanders slides: presentations using Flemish corporate identity, rendered pdf templates available RStudio using File > New file > R Markdown > template. details, including instructions installation usage available INBOmd website.

title: Markdown Templates for INBO
text: documents created INBOmd https://inbo.github.io/inbomd_examples https://doi.org/10.21436/inbor.14030462 https://doi.org/10.21436/inbop.14901626 https://pureportal.inbo./portal/files/12819590/rbelgium_20170307.pdf https://doi.org/10.21436/inbor.12304086

title: Markdown Templates for INBO
text: INBOmd requires working LaTeX distribution (conversion markdown pdf). highly recommend use LaTeX distribution provided R package tinytex. Close open R sessions start fresh R session. Execute commands . install R package tinytex TinyTex LaTeX distribution machine. admin rights required. Although TinyTeX lightweight installation, still several 100 MB large. case installation TinyTeX fails Windows, run command retry install TinyTex. TinyTeX installed, need restart RStudio. can proceed installation INBOmd.
code: update.packages(ask = FALSE, checkBuilt = TRUE) if (!"tinytex" %in% rownames(installed.packages())) {   install.packages("tinytex") } # install the TinyTeX LaTeX distribution if (!tinytex:::is_tinytex()) {   tinytex::install_tinytex() } Sys.setenv(PATH = paste0(old_path, ";C:\\Windows\\system32")) # installation from inbo.r-universe install.packages("INBOmd", repos = "https://inbo.r-universe.dev")  ## alternative: installation from github #if (!require("pak")) { #  install.packages("pak") #} #pak::pkg_install("inbo/INBOmd", dependencies = TRUE)  # add the local latex package contained in INBOmd to the TinyTeX install tinytex::tlmgr_conf(   c("auxtrees", "add", system.file("local_tex", package = "INBOmd")) )  # install some other needed latex packages tinytex::tlmgr_install(c(   "babel-dutch", "babel-english", "babel-french", "dvips", "helvetic",   "hyphen-dutch", "hyphen-french", "inconsolata", "tex", "times" ))

what: Add an author to the a report — add_author
title: Add an author to the a report — add_author
text: function interactively add information author local authors database.

title: Add an author to the a report — add_author
code: add_author(path = ".")

title: Add an author to the a report — add_author
text: path path index.Rmd bookdown report.

what: Add the report numbers to a bookdown report — add_report_numbers
title: Add the report numbers to a bookdown report — add_report_numbers
text: Add report numbers bookdown report

title: Add the report numbers to a bookdown report — add_report_numbers
code: add_report_numbers(   path = ".",   doi,   year,   reportnr,   depotnr,   photo,   description,   embargo = Sys.Date(),   ordernr,   copies,   motivation,   pages )

title: Add the report numbers to a bookdown report — add_report_numbers
text: path path index.Rmd bookdown report. doi string containing DOI. year Publication year reportnr Report number assigned INBO library. depotnr Report number assigned INBO library. photo Link image used cover. description Description photo, including author information. embargo earliest date report can made public INBO website. Defaults today. ordernr Optional reference number specified client. copies Set required number copies case really need printed version report. Omit case require digital version. Keep mind INBO policy "radically digital". implies print report mandatory. motivation Required motivation case copies set non-zero number. pages Number pages report. required case copies set non-zero number.

what: Insert a markdown block These functions will add template chunks into your .Rmd file. A markdown block will be display as a frame with a title in a different background. There are 3 types of blocks:
title: Insert a markdown block These functions will add template chunks into your .Rmd file. A markdown block will be display as a frame with a title in a different background. There are 3 types of blocks:
text: Insert markdown block functions add template chunks .Rmd file. markdown block display frame title different background. 3 types blocks: "block", "exampleblock" "alertblock".

title: Insert a markdown block These functions will add template chunks into your .Rmd file. A markdown block will be display as a frame with a title in a different background. There are 3 types of blocks:
code: insert_block()  insert_exampleblock()  insert_alertblock()

title: Create a template for an INBOmd bookdown report — create_report
text: path folder create folder containing report. Defaults current working directory. shortname name report project. location folder shortname depends content path. path subfolder git repository, changed root git repository. path checklist::checklist project, find new report path/source/shortname. path checklist::checklist package, find new report path/inst/shortname. Otherwise find new report path/shortname.

title: Deprecated functions — kolom_breedte
code: kolom_breedte(aantal = 3, marge = 20, witruimte = 10)  kolom_start(aantal = 3, start = 1, marge = 20, witruimte = 10)  ebook()  inbo_ebook()  inbo_handouts(   toc = TRUE,   nup = c("8", "1", "1plus", "2", "3", "3plus", "4", "4plus", "6"),   ... )  inbo_rapport_css(format = "html")  inbo_verslag(   present = "",   absent = "",   chair = "",   floatbarrier = c(NA, "section", "subsection", "subsubsection"),   includes = NULL,   codesize = c("footnotesize", "scriptsize", "tiny", "small", "normalsize"),   lang = "dutch",   keep_tex = FALSE,   fig_crop = TRUE,   pandoc_args = NULL,   ... )  inbo_zending(   conference,   conferencedate,   conferenceplace,   website = "",   reportdate,   colleagues = "",   floatbarrier = c(NA, "section", "subsection", "subsubsection"),   includes = NULL,   codesize = c("footnotesize", "scriptsize", "tiny", "small", "normalsize"),   lang = "dutch",   keep_tex = FALSE,   fig_crop = TRUE,   pandoc_args = NULL,   ... )  inbo_rapport(fig_crop = "auto", includes = NULL, pandoc_args = NULL, ...)  report(fig_crop = "auto", includes = NULL, pandoc_args = NULL, ...)  inbo_poster(   subtitle,   codesize = c("footnotesize", "scriptsize", "tiny", "small", "normalsize"),   lang = "english",   email = "info@inbo.be",   keep_tex = FALSE,   fig_crop = TRUE,   includes = NULL,   pandoc_args = NULL,   ... )  inbo_slides(toc = TRUE, ...)

title: Deprecated functions — kolom_breedte
text: aantal desired number columns equal width. marge horizontal distance columns mm. witruimte width whitespace edge around poster mm. start number column toc display table content title slide nup Number slides page. Defaults 8. 'plus' layouts leave blank space recipients make handwritten notes next slide. Note 2, 3plus, 4 6 layouts intended slides 4:3 aspect ratio, 3, 4plus 8 layouts intended widescreen slides like 16:10 aspect ratio. ... currently ignored format defunct present names persons attended meeting absent names persons make chair chair meeting floatbarrier place automatic float barriers. includes Named list additional content include within document (typically created using includes function). codesize relative font size code lang main language keep_tex Keep intermediate tex file used conversion PDF. Note argument control whether keep auxiliary files (e.g., .aux) generated LaTeX compiling .tex .pdf. keep files, may set options(tinytex.clean = FALSE). fig_crop Whether crop PDF figures command pdfcrop. requires tools pdfcrop ghostscript installed. default, fig_crop = TRUE two tools available. pandoc_args Additional command line options pass pandoc conference name conference workshop conferencedate date conference conferenceplace location conference website website conference reportdate date report colleagues name colleagues attending conference subtitle optional subtitle email email address display bottom. Defaults "info@inbo."

what: Use a different table style depending on the output format — dyn_table
title: Use a different table style depending on the output format — dyn_table
text: interactive session: DT::datatable() html: DT::datatable() : knitr::kable()

title: Use a different table style depending on the output format — dyn_table
code: dyn_table(x, caption = NULL, rownames = FALSE, escape = TRUE, align, ...)

title: Use a different table style depending on the output format — dyn_table
text: x dataframe caption table caption; character vector tag object generated htmltools::tags$caption() rownames TRUE (show row names) FALSE (hide row names) character vector row names; default, row names displayed first column table exist (NULL) escape whether escape HTML entities table: TRUE means escape whole table, FALSE means escape ; alternatively, can specify numeric column indices column names indicate columns escape, e.g. 1:5 (first 5 columns), c(1, 3, 4), c(-1, -3) (columns except first third), c('Species', 'Sepal.Length'); since row names take first column display, add numeric column indices one using rownames align Column alignment: character vector consisting 'l' (left), 'c' (center) /'r' (right). default align = NULL, numeric columns right-aligned, columns left-aligned. length(align) == 1L, string expanded vector individual letters, e.g. 'clc' becomes c('c', 'l', 'c'), unless output format LaTeX. ... arguments (see Examples References).

title: Style for e-book — epub_book
text: version bookdown::epub_book() different styling.

title: Style for e-book — epub_book
code: epub_book()

what: Available YAML headers options shared among output formats
title: Style for e-book — epub_book
text: title: main title subtitle: optional subtitle author: authors formatted indicated section . flandersfont: set TRUE, use Flanders Art Sans font. set, set FALSE empty, use Calibri font. style: Defaults "INBO" missing. "INBO" INBO style. "Vlaanderen" generic style Flemish Government Dutch. "Flanders" generic style Flemish Government language Dutch. lang: main language document RFC 5646 tags. style "INBO" "Vlaanderen" require "nl" lang. style "Flanders" uses "en" default can use languages ("nl"). "nl" Dutch "en" English "fr" French codesize: Relative size R code compared normal text. Defaults "footnotesize". options going large small : "normalsize", "small", "footnotesize", "scriptsize", "tiny". "normalsize" implies size normal text.

title: Style for e-book — epub_book
text: Quotes required part contains spaces. author ORCID, can omit line. However, note INBO policy scientific personnel required obtain ORCID https://orcid.org. Add corresponding: true corresponding author.
code: - name:      given: "Authors first name"      family: "Authors last name"     email: "local-part@domain.com"     orcid: 0000-0002-1825-0097     corresponding: true

what: Available YAML headers options specific for reports
title: Style for e-book — epub_book
text: Bold items required creating public report. Omitting results ugly warning rendered document. deliberate done can prepare document without adding information. ugly warnings nudges add required information publication. public_report: logical value indicating whether report published . Setting public_report: FALSE alter colophon. Omitting public_report equivalent public_report: TRUE. internal report DOI. Setting DOI equivalent public_report: TRUE. reviewer: names reviewers. Use syntax authors. year: year publication. Used places shortauthor. cover_photo: relative path image want cover. cover_description: Description cover photo, including information author picture license information. cover relative path pdf cover provided graphical designer. first page pdf prepended pdf version report. becomes title page web e-book version report. also shows thumbnail floating table content web version. doi: Digital Object Identifier report. Used conjunction shortauthor year. reportnr: Report number assigned INBO library. ordernr: Optional reference number specified client. depotnr: Report number assigned INBO library. client: Optionally name, address website client. client_logo: Optionally logo client. used client set. cooperation: Optionally name, address website organisation collaborated . cooperation_logo: Optionally logo collaborator. used cooperation set. geraardsbergen: Set TRUE add address INBO Geraardsbergen colophon. set set FALSE add address INBO Brussels. watermark: optional text display watermark pdf html. Note omitting required element automatically generate watermark text "DRAFT". Fill required fields get ride automatic watermark.

what: Available YAML headers options specific for gitbook
title: Output format for a web version of the report — gitbook
text: github-repo: can optionally set github repo organisation/repository format (e.g. inbo/INBOmd). add 'edit' button source file GitHub. Note people write access can edit files directly repository. Others can edit source code fork repository suggest changes pull request. split_by: name HTML output files book: chapter+number means split file first-level headers; section+number means second-level headers. chapter+number section+number, HTML file names determined header ID's, e.g. file name first chapter chapter title # Introduction 1-introduction.html. Note need place least one level 1 heading index.Rmd. Otherwise get index.html file.

what: Available YAML headers options specific for slides
title: Use the handout version of slides with the INBO theme — handouts
text: location: optional text placed title slide (sub)title. institute: optional text placed title slide author. toc: add slide table content. Defaults TRUE. toc_name: slide title table content. Defaults Overzicht missing. cover_photo: relative path image want cover. missing, get default picture. cover_horizontal: omitted, scale cover_photo covers full page vertically. set value FALSE empty, scale cover_photo covers full page horizontally. cover_offset: measurement like 8mm -1.5cm. Positive values move cover_photo upwards title slide. Negative values move cover_photo downwards. cover_hoffset: Similar cover_offset moves cover_photo horizontally. Positive values move right, negative values left. aspect: required aspect ratio slides. Defaults "16:9". See section list available aspect ratios. fontsize: Size normal text slides. elements scaled accordingly. Defaults "11pt". See section Aspect_ratio details. website: URL sidebar. Defaults vlaanderen./inbo.

title: Use the handout version of slides with the INBO theme — handouts
text: table lists available aspect ratios "paper size". main advantage using small “paper size” can use normal fonts natural sizes. E.g. 11pt font slide readable 11pt font A4 paper.

Used conjunction shortauthor year. reportnr: Report number assigned INBO library. ordernr: Optional reference number specified client. depotnr: Report number assigned INBO library. client: Optionally name, address website client. client_logo: Optionally logo client. used client set. cooperation: Optionally name, address website organisation collaborated . cooperation_logo: Optionally logo collaborator. used cooperation set. geraardsbergen: Set TRUE add address INBO Geraardsbergen colophon. set set FALSE add address INBO Brussels. watermark: optional text display watermark pdf html. what: Available YAML headers options specific for reports in pdf format
title: Create a report with the Flemish corporate identity — pdf_report
text: Bold items required. Omitting results ugly warning rendered document. deliberate done can prepare document without adding information. ugly warnings nudges add required information publication. embargo: date report made public INBO website. print: section required case need number printed copies. set requires following sub items: copies: number copies motivation: motivate need printed copies INBO policy use digital publications. pages: number pages full document. tocdepth: level headers display. 0: chapters (#) 1: section (##) default 2: subsection (###) lof: Adds list figures pdf table content set TRUE. Omits list figures missing set FALSE. lot: Adds list tables pdf table content list figures set TRUE. Omits list tables missing set FALSE. hyphenation: optional list words specified hyphenation pattern. E.g. hyphenation: "fortran, ergo--mic" forces word "fortran" remain single word. "ergonomic" can either entire word, split "ergo" "nomic" split "ergono" "mic". floatbarrier: float barrier forces place floating figures tables placing remainder document. can place manually setting \floatbarrier. option allows set automatically heading. Defaults NA (float barriers starting new chapter #). Options "section" (# ##), "subsection" (#, ## ###) "subsubsection" (#, ##, ### ####). other_lang: languages want use pdf version. Available options "nl", "en" "fr" Defaults available languages except main language.

title: Create a report with the Flemish corporate identity — pdf_report
text: can define parts text different language main language (e.g. abstract different language). currently limited Dutch, English French. Use \bdutch \edutch text Dutch. Use \benglish \eenglish text English. Use \bfrench \efrench text French. styles "INBO" "Vlaanderen" French English optional languages. Flanders style default Dutch French optional languages. Setting language affects hyphenation pattern names items like figures, tables, table contents, list figures, list tables, references, page numbers, ...

Note argument control whether keep auxiliary files (e.g., .aux) generated LaTeX compiling .tex .pdf. keep files, may set options(tinytex.clean = FALSE). fig_crop TRUE automatically apply pdfcrop utility (available) pdf figures includes Named list additional content include within document (typically created using includes function). pandoc_args Additional command line options pass pandoc. ... extra parameters: see details

title: Create a poster with the INBO theme version 2015 — poster
text: Available extra parameters: hyphenation: correct hyphenation certain words flandersfont: Use Flanders Art Sans font. Defaults FALSE. Note requires font present system. ORCID: list authors. author must name ID. ID author's ORCID ID , see https://orcid.org. information displayed QR code bottom poster. DOI: list documents. document must name ID. ID document's DOI, see https://doi.org. information displayed QR code bottom poster.

what: Available YAML headers options specific for slides
title: pdf slides with an INBO or Flanders theme — slides
text: location: optional text placed title slide (sub)title. institute: optional text placed title slide author. toc: add slide table content. Defaults TRUE. toc_name: slide title table content. Defaults Overzicht missing. cover_photo: relative path image want cover. missing, get default picture. cover_horizontal: omitted, scale cover_photo covers full page vertically. set value FALSE empty, scale cover_photo covers full page horizontally. cover_offset: measurement like 8mm -1.5cm. See section list available aspect ratios. fontsize: Size normal text slides. elements scaled accordingly. Defaults "11pt". See section Aspect_ratio details. website: URL sidebar. Defaults vlaanderen./inbo.

title: pdf slides with an INBO or Flanders theme — slides
text: table lists available aspect ratios "paper size". main advantage using small “paper size” can use normal fonts natural sizes. E.g. 11pt font slide readable 11pt font A4 paper.

title: validate a DOI — validate_doi
text: Checks format DOI. format must obey https://www.doi.org/doi_handbook/2_Numbering.html#2.2 DOI minimal version. Hence doi:, https://doi.org prefixes. example minimal version 10.21436/inbor.70809860. part forward slash consists two three sets digits separated dot. E.g. 10.21436 10.21436.1. part forward slash consists either digits two sets character separated dot.

title: validate a DOI — validate_doi
code: validate_doi(doi)

title: validate a DOI — validate_doi
text: doi string containing DOI.

title: INBOmd 0.6.5
text: Use latest version citeme checklist.

title: INBOmd 0.6.4
text: Fix missing subtitle citation colophon gitbook epub.

title: INBOmd 0.6.3
text: pdf_report() enforces pandoc >= 3.1.8 create_report() fixed (#97)

title: INBOmd 0.6.2
text: pdf_report(), gitbook() epub_book() gain option create internal reports different colophon. pdf_report() gitbook() gain watermark argument. adds text watermark margin every page. automatic watermark appears one required colophon fields missing. Adding information required colophon fields remove automatic watermark. INBO personnel must display proper affiliation ORCID. Bugfixes

title: INBOmd 0.6.1
text: INBO authors reviewers now must use orcid standardised affiliation. infer INBO membership author’s email address. create_report() add_author() set INBO author affiliation language report. slides() longer requires reviewer. Install missing TinyTeX installation packages. Bugfixes create_report().

title: INBOmd 0.6.0
text: Author reviewer information must given explicit format mandatory name mandatory sub-fields given family. corresponding: true indicates corresponding author. email optional, except corresponding author. orcid optional persons.

title: INBOmd 0.6.0
text: Add create_report() interactively create empty report. Add add_report_numbers() add DOI, report number, … existing report. Add add_author() interactively add author existing report. Add validate_doi() validate DOI. pdf_report(), gitbook() epub_book() use function validate optional DOI set.

title: INBOmd 0.5.3
text: Rename report() pdf_report() epub() epub_book(). bookdown requires name generic output format name. Convert covers png instead jpg avoid typical artefacts around text. Automatically add “Edit” gitbook report available git repository.

title: INBOmd 0.5.2
text: Templates now mention url vlaanderen./inbo instead https://www.vlaanderen./inbo www.vlaanderen./inbo. Bug fix website "inbomd_examples". gitbook() uses reference title chapter bibliographies main bibliography. references() takes lang account HTML formats. Bugfix Dockerfile.

title: INBOmd 0.5.1
text: Add language French style Flanders

title: INBOmd 0.5.0
text: Every output format now dedicated function using English name. longer use prefixes. YAML options now uniform across output formats. Please look documentation output format find list available options. list old output formats new name. bookdown::pdf_book INBOmd::inbo_rapport -> INBOmd::report bookdown::gitbook -> INBOmd::gitbook bookdown::epub_book -> INBOmd::ebook bookdown::pdf_book INBOmd::inbo_slides -> INBOmd::slides presentation, INBOmd::handouts handouts, INBOmd::report handouts lots R code output (useful R tutorials courses)

title: INBOmd 0.5.0
text: Use pandoc render citations report() pdf instead natbib (#63, @ThierryO). report() supports custom languages using style = "Flanders" (#64, @ThierryO). Update CSL style recent version (#63, @florisvdh). Add colophon reports pdf, gitbook epub formats. Rendering pdf reports generates cover.txt. files contains required information create cover page. New function references() allows define location insert bibliography. optional appendix starts bibliography. slides() generates visible table content (#66). Update report() RMarkdown template. contains available options YAML header. Add new template non-Dutch report English default language. Reports use Calibri default font. Gitbook reports gains thumbnail report top table content user provides cover image. Gitbook epub formats gain English variant.

title: INBOmd 0.5.0
text: Setup quality assurance using checklist.
